nodes.name: Update filename attribute to message id

Properties:
- Delete Attributes Expression: None
- Stateful Variables Initial Value: None
- Store State: Do not store state

- filename: ${email.headers.message-id}

nodes.name: Copy signup attributes to names without dots
ForkRecord on members
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.ForkRecord
Properties:
- fork-mode: split
- include-parent-fields: true
- member: /members
- record-reader: 0feb8305-71b4-3dcd-aad2-925843cbba25
- record-writer: 8ebb759d-9899-3050-a25a-6d0a54097ec3

nodes.name: ConvertHTMLToText
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: com.shortcentral.nifi.processors.ConvertHTMLToText
Properties:
- convert_br_to_lf: true

nodes.name: GetFile
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.GetFile
Properties:
- Batch Size: 10
- File Filter: [^\.].*
- Ignore Hidden Files: true
- Input Directory: /var/lib/nifi/emails
- Keep Source File: false
- Maximum File Age: None
- Maximum File Size: None
- Minimum File Age: 0 sec
- Minimum File Size: 0 B
- Path Filter: None
- Polling Interval: 0 sec
- Recurse Subdirectories: false

nodes.name: Extract members and payer from email
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.ExtractText
Properties:
- Character Set: UTF-8
- Enable Canonical Equivalence: false
- Enable Case-insensitive Matching: false
- Enable DOTALL Mode: false
- Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern: false
- Enable Multiline Mode: true
- Enable Unicode Predefined Character Classes: false
- Enable Unicode-aware Case Folding: false
- Enable Unix Lines Mode: false
- Enable named group support: true
- Enable repeating capture group: false
- Include Capture Group 0: false
- Maximum Buffer Size: 1 MB
- Maximum Capture Group Length: 1024
- Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern: false
- member: ^Members? names?: (?<member>[\p{L}\x20\-',]+);?$
- method: ^Payment method: (?<method>.*)$
- payer: ^(?<payer>[\p{L}\x20\-']+) has applied for (?<product>.*).$

nodes.name: ConsumeIMAP - members.avondale
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.email.ConsumeIMAP
Host: imap.gmail.com
User: members.avondaleltc@gmail.com
Port: 993
Use SSL: true

nodes.name: ConsumeIMAP - shortcentral
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.email.ConsumeIMAP
Host: da5.thewebhostserver.com
User: steve@shortcentral.com
Port: 993
Use SSL: true

parameters.query:
=insert into email_status (message_id, send_date, "from", subject, status_date, status)
values ('{{$json.email.headers["message-id"]}}', '{{$json.email.headers.sent_date}}', '{{$json.email.headers.from[0]}}', '{{$json.email.headers.subject}}', now(), 'Start processing');

nodes.name: PutSQL
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.PutSQL
Properties: {'Support Fragmented Transactions': 'true', 'putsql-sql-statement': 'insert into email_status (message_id, send_date, "from", subject, status_date, status)\nvalues (\'${email.headers.message-id}\', \'${email.headers.sent_date}\', \'${email.headers.from.0}\', \'${email.headers.subject}\', now(), \'Start processing\');', 'Transaction Timeout': None, 'Batch Size': '100', 'Obtain Generated Keys': 'false', 'JDBC Connection Pool': 'effa5772-b76d-3839-8ee1-8c97cd3c59f3', 'database-session-autocommit': 'false', 'rollback-on-failure': 'false'}

nodes.name: LogMessage
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.LogMessage
Properties:
- log-level: warn
- log-message: Message ${email.headers.message-id}: JSON processing error.
- log-prefix: None

nodes.name: LogMessage (2)
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.LogMessage
Properties:
- log-level: info
- log-message: Message ${email.headers.message-id}: Successfully added membership signup for ${member}
- log-prefix: None

nodes.name: Extract payment status from email
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.ExtractText
Properties:
- Character Set: UTF-8
- Enable Canonical Equivalence: false
- Enable Case-insensitive Matching: false
- Enable DOTALL Mode: false
- Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern: false
- Enable Multiline Mode: true
- Enable Unicode Predefined Character Classes: false
- Enable Unicode-aware Case Folding: false
- Enable Unix Lines Mode: false
- Enable named group support: true
- Enable repeating capture group: false
- Include Capture Group 0: false
- Maximum Buffer Size: 1 MB
- Maximum Capture Group Length: 1024
- Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern: false
- status: ^We have successfully received payment by credit or debit card, and the membership is "(?<status>.*)".$

nodes.name: LogMessage (3)
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.LogMessage
Properties:
- log-level: warn
- log-message: Message ${email.headers.message-id}: Missing payment status information.
- log-prefix: None

parameters.query:
=update email_status set status_date = now(), status = 'Processed'
where message_id = '{{$json.email.headers["message-id"]}}';

parameters.query:
=insert into member_signups (signup_date, member, product, payer, cost, quantity, type, method, status)
values ('{{$json.signup_date}}', '{{$json.member}}', '{{$json.product}}', '{{$json.payer}}', '{{$json.cost}}', '{{$json.quantity}}', '{{$json.type}}', '{{$json.method}}', '{{$json.status}}');

nodes.name: Extract subscription payment from email
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.ExtractText
Properties:
- Character Set: UTF-8
- Enable Canonical Equivalence: false
- Enable Case-insensitive Matching: false
- Enable DOTALL Mode: false
- Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern: false
- Enable Multiline Mode: true
- Enable Unicode Predefined Character Classes: false
- Enable Unicode-aware Case Folding: false
- Enable Unix Lines Mode: false
- Enable named group support: true
- Enable repeating capture group: false
- Include Capture Group 0: false
- Maximum Buffer Size: 1 MB
- Maximum Capture Group Length: 1024
- Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern: false
- cost: ^Monthly cost: £(?<cost>[0-9-.]+)$
- member: ^Members? names?: (?<member>[\p{L}\x20-*',]+);?$
- method: ^Payment method: (?<method>.*)$
- payer: ^(?<payer>.*) has applied for (?<product>.*).$
- quantity: ^Number of installments: (?<quantity>.*)$

nodes.name: Extract payment status from email (2)
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.ExtractText
Properties:
- Character Set: UTF-8

- Enable repeating capture group: false
- Include Capture Group 0: false

- Maximum Capture Group Length: 1024

- status: ^We have successfully received payment instructions to set up the (?<installmenttype>Subscription|Direct Debit)\. Their payment will appear as "(?<status>.*)" until we receive notification from (?<provider>.+) that the payment has cleared\.$

nodes.name: Extract payment status from email (3)
nodes.notes:
NiFi type: org.apache.nifi.processors.standard.ExtractText
Properties:
- Character Set: UTF-8
- Enable Canonical Equivalence: false
- Enable Case-insensitive Matching: false

nodes.notes:
